baseline.rationale: 0.24 adopts a blocking ratchet from the immutable 0.23.0 release artifacts and the post-Task-36 source state.

increase_policy: A ceiling increase requires a documented architecture decision, an updated baseline fixture, and focused tests that prove the changed ceiling still fails closed.

default_mcp_tools.rationale: The default conversational surface remains the seven-tool 0.22 core.

full_profile_mcp_tools.rationale: The 0.22 full-profile catalog is a hard ceiling and may ratchet only downward without an architecture decision.

stable_cli_top_level_commands.rationale: The 0.24 grouped CLI exposes eleven stable top-level command families.

primary_dashboard_routes.rationale: Home, Explore, and Limits are the complete primary Evidence Console.

shell_utility_dashboard_routes.rationale: Settings is the only shell utility route.

contextual_dashboard_routes.rationale: Evidence is the only contextual supporting route.

unbudgeted_python_files_over_600.rationale: No new runtime Python file may exceed 600 physical lines and grandfathered debt may not grow.

unbudgeted_frontend_source_files_over_50.rationale: No new authored frontend source may exceed 500 physical lines and grandfathered debt may not grow.

wheel_bytes.rationale: Immutable PyPI 0.23.0 wheel size plus exactly five percent headroom, rounded up.

sdist_bytes.rationale: Immutable PyPI 0.23.0 source distribution size plus exactly five percent headroom, rounded up.

main_initial_react_js_gzip_bytes.rationale: Post-constellation-removal initial React JavaScript plus exactly ten percent headroom, rounded up.

stable_json_schemas.rationale: The 95 schemas in 0.23.0 plus nineteen explicitly approved 0.24 contract additions form the adoption ceiling.

sqlite_schema_increments.rationale: The prospective release ratchet starts at schema 37; the already-approved pre-adoption 0.24 migrations from 34 to 37 are documented architecture history.
